title: The Rocket Boat to Mouseland
summary: Best friends Mickey, Minnie, and Mole set off on an epic voyage after borrowing a magnificent vessel from the Princess of Mouseland. To earn the boat, they must first assist the Princess in her royal duty of naming various cheeses for her mouse subjects. Once they set sail, they discover a mysterious 'ZOOM' button that transforms their sailboat into a high-speed rocket ship. After a thrilling, water-spraying dash across the ocean, the friends manage to engage an emergency stop button just in time, landing safely beside a beautiful tropical island with a towering central mountain.

highlightQuote.text: Keep telling the story and then you'll find out, yo yo!

transcript.speaker: Dad
transcript.text: Okay, that's a good place for the voice. Now let's turn on the flashlight and we'll get this thing set up and I'll put it under. Okay so we've got some stars.

transcript.speaker: Izzy
transcript.text: Twinkle twinkle.

transcript.speaker: Dad
transcript.text: And then I'll turn off the light and now it's time...

transcript.speaker: Izzy
transcript.text: I want a story about Mickey Minnie Mole. I want a story about Mickey Minnie Mole.

transcript.speaker: Dad
transcript.text: Stars and Stories. About... yeah tell the story about Mickey Minnie and Mole.

transcript.speaker: Dad
transcript.text: Well Mickey, Minnie and Mole were very good friends and they liked to spend a lot of time together playing and having meals and going on adventures too.

transcript.speaker: Izzy
transcript.text: What do you want to do Mickey and Minnie and Mole?

transcript.speaker: Dad
transcript.text: And one day Mickey and Minnie and Mole set out on their biggest adventure yet. They decided to go... hmm... where did they decide to go? What kind of adventure do you think they should go on? Did they go all the way around the world? Or flying in an airplane? Did they go...

transcript.speaker: Izzy
transcript.text: They went in a giant giant boat!

transcript.speaker: Dad
transcript.text: In a giant giant boat. That's a great idea. Mickey and Minnie thought to themselves, 'You know it's a beautiful day,' said Mickey, 'we should go, we should go sailing.' And Minnie said, 'You know, I have a friend who has a giant giant boat.' Um, whose friend of Minnie's was it that has the giant boat? Was it Jane the cat? Does she have a giant boat?

transcript.speaker: Izzy
transcript.text: No.

transcript.speaker: Dad
transcript.text: Was it Uncle Bill?

transcript.speaker: Izzy
transcript.text: No.

transcript.speaker: Dad
transcript.text: Was it Garfield? No, cats are animals or mice... who should we borrow the boat from?

transcript.speaker: Izzy
transcript.text: Maybe you could borrow it from the Princess of Mouseland. Maybe you could borrow a boat from the Princess of Mouseland.

transcript.speaker: Dad
transcript.text: The Princess of Mouseland, said Minnie, of course!

transcript.speaker: Izzy
transcript.text: She has a big boat that you can sail on.

transcript.speaker: Dad
transcript.text: And the Mole said, 'Um excuse me, how do we get to Mouseland to find this Princess and her boat?' And Mickey and Minnie said, 'Don't worry about that, we'll just drive there.' And so they hopped into their Mousecar, which was a special car that had giant round ears and went vroom. The Mole had never been in this car and was very excited. He said, 'I'm very excited to be in the Mousecar.' And they drove out of their driveway and onto the road and went vroom vroom vroom vroom vroom. And Mole said, 'Oh my gosh, this is a long car ride, is Mouseland far away?'

transcript.speaker: Izzy
transcript.text: No it's just a short drive you just have to go on Mouse Street and it's very very very far.

transcript.speaker: Dad
transcript.text: And Mickey said, 'Yep, we're almost there. Oh here's a big sign. What does that sign say?'

transcript.speaker: Izzy
transcript.text: It says stop when you stop. It's a stop sign.

transcript.speaker: Dad
transcript.text: Oh yeah, it's a stop! Screech! And so he slammed on the brakes and they stopped the car.

transcript.speaker: Izzy
transcript.text: And then, and then the green light tells you to drive drive drive all the way.

transcript.speaker: Dad
transcript.text: And then the green light came on and they drove drove drove some more. And then they saw something in the distance sparkling and beautiful. What was it?

transcript.speaker: Izzy
transcript.text: What is it? It was the Princess of Mouseland!

transcript.speaker: Dad
transcript.text: It was the Princess herself standing there sparkling in her beautiful sparkly outfit. Now what kind of outfit was the Princess of Mouseland wearing?

transcript.speaker: Izzy
transcript.text: It was blue and she had a big crown on her head.

transcript.speaker: Dad
transcript.text: And she was very busy that day. What was she doing?

transcript.speaker: Izzy
transcript.text: Hey Princess of Mouseland, do you have a big giant boat?

transcript.speaker: Dad
transcript.text: And the Princess of Mouseland said, 'Oh dear, I'm very busy being the Princess of Mouseland today because all of the mice need me to name their cheeses. And once I've done this, perhaps with your help, I can lend you my beautiful boat. Now this cheese... hmm...' She picked it up and said, 'Sniff sniff sniff... Ah yes, this is cheddar.' And then the next mouse came up and held up the cheese. And Mickey decided to try and help out, and Mickey sniffed the cheese. And what did Mickey say?

transcript.speaker: Izzy
transcript.text: Mmm-hmm.

transcript.speaker: Dad
transcript.text: And the Princess said, 'Yes you give it a name, what name do you give that cheese?' You can make up the name if you want to, they don't mind.

transcript.speaker: Izzy
transcript.text: Yum Yum Cheese.

transcript.speaker: Dad
transcript.text: Yum Yum Cheese! And then the next mouse in line came up and this cheese was very very stinky. 'Hmm, what will we name this one?' said the Princess. And the Mole held up the cheese to his nose and went 'Bleh!'

transcript.speaker: Izzy
transcript.text: Bleh, hee hee.

transcript.speaker: Dad
transcript.text: And the mouse said, 'Oh, the name of the cheese is Bleh?' And the Mole said, 'Well that's not what I meant but that's a pretty good name.' Well that was a lot of cheeses, but there's just one more. A very very very big cheese. Bright yellow and rubbery and wibbly and wobbly. The Princess says, 'Oh this big cheese needs a wonderful big name. Could you help us Isabella?'

transcript.speaker: Izzy
transcript.text: No, I'm too busy.

transcript.speaker: Dad
transcript.text: Oh dear me. Well I'll give it a name. I'll say it's the Gargantuan Wibbly Wobble Cheese. And the Princess said, 'Well now I've done my duties and I can help you. What was your thing again that you needed help with?'

transcript.speaker: Izzy
transcript.text: We need to get a big big boat.

transcript.speaker: Dad
transcript.text: Oh yes, the boat. My boat has just had it repaired and it has some wonderful new features. But I'm too busy today, I have to go off and help some mice eat their acorns. So you're welcome to use the boat all by yourselves. Goodbye!' And with that, the Princess of Mouseland ran off. Mickey and Minnie and the Mole walked over to it and climbed aboard. And what did they find on the boat?

transcript.speaker: Izzy
transcript.text: What?

transcript.speaker: Dad
transcript.text: Well there were some special snacks of course. What kind of snacks were there?

transcript.speaker: Izzy
transcript.text: Acorns! Leaves! Walnuts! Cheese! Lettuce! Pancakes! Watermelon! Bacon!

transcript.speaker: Dad
transcript.text: Lots of delicious snacks. Mickey said, 'Okay we made it. Now how do we sail it?' And the Mole said, 'Oh yeah, I know how to do it.' He found a big sheet of fabric and some ropes and pulled up the sail. It opened up, whoosh! And then it billowed out in the wind and the boat started to move. And the Mole said, 'See, I'm a sailor Mole.'

transcript.speaker: Dad
transcript.text: And so they set out to sea on their boat, the wind ruffling their fur. They discovered something else about their boat. And what was that?

transcript.speaker: Izzy
transcript.text: Keep telling the story and then you'll find out.

transcript.speaker: Dad
transcript.text: It was a big button. And what did the button say on it?

transcript.speaker: Izzy
transcript.text: Keep telling the story and then you'll find out, yo yo!

transcript.speaker: Dad
transcript.text: It has a word. Z-O-O-M. Zoom! Wait a minute, what's this button going to do? Mickey got so excited and he just pushed his paw down onto the big red button. And you know what happened?

transcript.speaker: Izzy
transcript.text: What?

transcript.speaker: Dad
transcript.text: The boat went Zoom because it had rocket engines on it! It was a special rocket boat. All of a sudden they went swoosh and went super fast. Then Mickey said, 'Wait a second, we better stop. Oh no, there's a big island with a mountain on it coming up fast! We better stop this boat before we crash!' What did they do?

transcript.speaker: Izzy
transcript.text: Keep telling the story and then you'll find out.

transcript.speaker: Dad
transcript.text: Mickey and Minnie looked all around. And the Mole suddenly looked down and right next to the Zoom button was another button. You know what that button said on it?

transcript.speaker: Izzy
transcript.text: Yeah, stop.

transcript.speaker: Dad
transcript.text: Mole pressed the button, click! And the boat went pshhh and it slowed right down. They stopped just a few feet away from the shore of a beautiful tropical island with a tall mountain. And I think we better continue this one another night. That's the end for now.

transcript.speaker: Izzy
transcript.text: Yes.

characters.name: Mickey
characters.description: One of Mistress Mouse’s storied stuffy mice, this famous plush adventurer is a visionary benefactor who manifests fragrant blooms from magic Legos and pilots his Mousecar through lightless depths. Whether arming moles for Kitty’s investigations or securing solutions for Frasgle, he remains fiercely loyal to Minnie, Mole, Izzy, and Hattie. Accompanied by a cheerful infant and shadowed by a friend’s disappearance, his haste to reach the spires of Peacock’s castle has left him without essential provisions, miring him in a sudden, hungry peril.

characters.name: Minnie
characters.description: A wise veteran of briny depths and interstellar frontiers, Mickey’s resourceful mouse companion and confidant to the Princess of Mouseland guides Izzy and Hattie with a glowing lantern and ingenious Mystery Mousketools. Having recently breathed life into a towering guardian of interlocking bricks, this intrepid traveler now points the way toward the mountain’s peak, pausing to investigate the savory aroma of bacon-scented mushrooms while serving as a compassionate friend whose seasoned instincts help decipher Frasgle’s complex roars and sounds.

characters.name: Mole
characters.description: A resourceful, perpetually humming mole with an impossibly long name, this polite and intrepid mariner serves as a bridge between worlds, translating Frasgle’s unique tongue and guiding the way to the hidden Underground Library. Whether managing rocket controls with wide-eyed curiosity, unraveling treehouse mysteries, or sharing the magic of special Legos, he encourages his companions to embrace the unknown between tending his dandelion yard and baking fragrant banana bread. A lover of both wriggly worms and sweet blueberries, he sings whimsical songs of carnabee sharks and drives a noisy dark brown car, remaining firmly hesitant about boarding giant robots even as he coaxes his friends toward bold new adventures.

characters.name: Princess of Mouseland
characters.description: Adorned in a shimmering, star-dusted gown and a crown of deep sapphire, this royal mouse governs her miniature kingdom by bestowing ceremonial names upon every wheel of artisanal cheese. Beneath her whimsical duties lies a legacy of enchantment, as she is the sovereign owner of the magical vessel currently ferrying the adventurers across the realms.

places.name: Mouseland
places.description: The ancestral homeland of Mickey, Minnie, and the Princess, this storied kingdom serves as both the royal residence and the vital port where the group ventures to reclaim their boat.

places.name: Mouse Street
places.description: A long, storied thoroughfare guiding explorers into the heart of Mouseland, this bustling street serves as both the cherished home of Hattie the Mouse and the vital hub for the community’s doctor’s office.

places.name: Princess's Boat
places.description: An enormous sparkly vessel equipped with both a traditional sail and secret rocket engines.

places.name: Tropical Island
places.description: A beautiful destination with a tall mountain rising out of its center where the friends eventually land.
